description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly red and black color scheme accented by green highlights. The body is constructed with a combination of matte and glossy surfaces, giving it a high-tech, sci-fi appearance. The rifle has a large, circular component near the trigger area, possibly functioning as an energy cell or advanced firing mechanism. The grip is integrated into the lower section, with ergonomic shaping for comfortable handling. Along the upper receiver, there are several green-lit indicators or buttons, suggesting electronic or energy-based operation. The barrel is compact and integrated into the main body, with no visible muzzle device, and the overall build is robust and solid, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic red and black rifle with green accents, featuring a circular component near the grip and electronic indicators along the body. Its angular, high-tech design suggests advanced, possibly energy-based operation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the circular component, grip, and green-lit indicators.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the compact barrel and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the grip and body details.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the width, the arrangement of the upper components, and the green-lit section.
